metadata.author: Eidolon Team
metadata.description: Clear the goblin menace from the ancient forest paths

passages.name: Forest Path Ambush
passages.text: The well-trodden path through Vedant Forest suddenly feels less safe. Three goblin scouts emerge from behind the dense trees, their crude weapons glinting in the filtered sunlight. The cool, damp air carries their foul stench as they block your way forward.

criticalSuccess.text: Your swift strikes scatter the scouts before they can coordinate. They flee, dropping a pouch of stolen coins.

success.text: You defeat the three goblins after a brief skirmish. They retreat into the forest, leaving behind some gold.

failure.text: The goblins overwhelm you with their numbers. You drive them off, but they steal some supplies.

criticalFailure.text: The ambush catches you completely off guard. You escape, but not without losses.

passages.name: Small Clearing Battle
passages.text: You pursue the fleeing scouts into a small clearing where wildflowers once grew peacefully. Now, five goblin warriors await you, having trampled the colorful blooms underfoot. The buzz of insects is drowned out by their guttural war cries.

criticalSuccess.text: You weave through their attacks like wind through trees. The goblins stumble over each other, making them easy targets.

success.text: Your agile movements keep you safe from most attacks. The warriors retreat, abandoning their supplies.

failure.text: The warriors coordinate better than expected. You escape, but they land several hits.

criticalFailure.text: Surrounded in the clearing, you barely escape the goblin warriors' coordinated assault.

passages.name: Ancient Oak Stand
passages.text: The goblins have made their camp beneath the ancient oak, defiling this sacred place with their presence. Seven raiders sharpen their weapons on the gnarled roots. Their leader, wearing a necklace of acorns, rises to face you. This ends here.

criticalSuccess.text: Your furious assault breaks their morale. The leader falls, and his raiders scatter into the deep forest, leaving behind their accumulated plunder.

success.text: After a brutal melee, you stand victorious. The surviving goblins flee, abandoning their ill-gotten treasures.

failure.text: The raiders prove too strong. You retreat, but at least you've disrupted their camp.

criticalFailure.text: The goblin leader's savage tactics overwhelm you. You flee in defeat.

passages.name: Forest Restored
passages.text: With the goblins routed, peace returns to Vedant Forest. The ancient oak stands tall once more, no longer defiled by the raiders' presence. Birds return to sing in the branches, and the forest path is safe for travelers again.

success.text: You search the abandoned camp and find a final hidden cache of goblin treasure.

failure.text: The forest is clear, and your work here is done.
